title: lotus arenarius var. canescens
intro: Lotus arenarius var. canescens, also known as the woolly-flowered lotus or lotus arenarius var. canescens, is a subspecies of the lotus arenarius, a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of lotus arenarius var. canescens include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, lotus arenarius var. canescens is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties.
